recommendations.title: The Wrong Missy
recommendations.overview: A guy meets the woman of his dreams and invites her to his company's corporate retreat, but realizes he sent the invite to the wrong person.

recommendations.title: Kinda Pregnant
recommendations.overview: When Lainy's plan to settle down and start a family falls apart, she puts on a fake baby bump, tells a lie — and accidentally falls for her dream guy.

recommendations.title: The Out-Laws
recommendations.overview: A straight-laced bank manager is about to marry the love of his life. When his bank is held up by infamous Ghost Bandits during his wedding week, he believes his future in-laws who just arrived in town, are the infamous Out-Laws.

recommendations.title: The Best of Me
recommendations.overview: A pair of former high school sweethearts reunite after many years when they return to visit their small hometown.

recommendations.title: Love and Honor
recommendations.overview: When a young soldier in Vietnam gets dumped by his hometown girl, he and his best friend decide to go AWOL and return to the States to win her back.

recommendations.title: The Boat That Rocked
recommendations.overview: When a group of rebellious deejays decides to defy the ban on government-censored music, they take to the seas to broadcast music and mayhem to millions of adoring fans.

recommendations.title: The Look of Silence
recommendations.overview: An optician grapples with the Indonesian mass killings of 1965-1966, during which his older brother was exterminated.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Boy
recommendations.overview: A married couple on the verge of separation are leveled by the news their 18-year-old son committed a mass-shooting at his college, then took his own life.

recommendations.title: Housefull 2
recommendations.overview: A comedy of errors wherein four men help each other to fool their prospective father-in-laws creating a cascade of confusion and mayhem.

recommendations.title: Blue Jay
recommendations.overview: Meeting by chance when they return to their tiny California hometown, two former high-school sweethearts reflect on their shared past.
